text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists and has its own dedicated page on Springer Nature (European Radiology, 2024, Vol. 34, pp. 4494–4503). The cited author "Patricia J Nelemans" is a minor name variant of the real author "Patty J. Nelemans," and the remaining authors match substantially — this is an acceptable minor formatting difference, not a fabrication.
LINK: https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s00330-023-10493-7
